steps.title: Read the context
steps.content: Nature seemed to put 'every <u>conceivable</u> obstacle' in the way — the writer means every possible kind of obstacle one could think up, emphasizing the difficulty of the journey.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Imaginable matches 'every kind one can think of' exactly. 'Obvious' (only those plain to see), 'reasonable' (only sensible ones), and 'dependable' (reliable) don't fit.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
